sections.title: User Guides
sections.description: Comprehensive documentation to help you get started with MADiE.

sections.title: Video Tutorials
sections.description: Watch step-by-step video tutorials to learn how to use MADiE effectively.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Find answers to common questions about MADiE.

sections.title: Release Notes
sections.description: MADiE release notes documenting new features, improvements, and fixes.

sections.title: User Group Slides

resources.title: MADiE User Guide
resources.description: Complete guide covering all features of the MADiE application including measure creation, editing, and testing.

resources.title: MADiE Access Guide
resources.description: Step-by-step instructions for obtaining access to the MADiE application.

resources.title: MADiE QDM Quick Reference Guide
resources.description: Quick reference for authoring QDM-based measures in MADiE.

resources.title: MADiE FHIR Quick Reference Guide
resources.description: Quick reference for authoring FHIR-based measures in MADiE.

resources.title: MADiE Overview
resources.description: Introduction to MADiE and its key features for measure development.

resources.title: Creating a New Measure
resources.description: Learn how to create and configure a new measure in MADiE.

resources.title: Working with Test Cases
resources.description: Tutorial on creating and running test cases for your measures.

resources.title: Exporting Measures
resources.description: How to export your measures in different formats.

resources.title: CQL (Clinical Quality Language) Reference
resources.description: Official documentation for the Clinical Quality Language used in eCQM development.

resources.title: eCQI Resource Center
resources.description: Central hub for electronic clinical quality improvement resources and tools.

resources.title: QDM User Guide
resources.description: Documentation for the Quality Data Model used in measure specifications.

resources.title: FHIR Quality Measure IG
resources.description: FHIR Implementation Guide for Quality Measures.

resources.title: How do I request access to MADiE?
resources.description: To request access to MADiE, visit the HCQIS Access Roles and Profile (HARP) system and submit a request for the MADiE application.

resources.title: What measure types does MADiE support?
resources.description: MADiE supports QDM (Quality Data Model) and FHIR (Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources) based quality measures.

resources.title: How do I export a measure from MADiE?
resources.description: You can export measures in HQMF (for QDM measures) or FHIR Measure Bundle formats from the measure details page.

resources.title: Who can I contact for technical support?
resources.description: For technical support, please email the MADiE support team at madie-support@cms.hhs.gov.
